title: Handling invalid date formats in Airtable Node
symptom: When sending an empty string, null, or an invalid date format to the Airtable node, an error occurs.
applies_when: Date field may be empty or improperly formatted
not_this_if: Date field is always valid and properly formatted
root_cause: Airtable requires dates to be in a specific format (YYYY-MM-DD). Sending empty strings, null, or invalid formats leads to errors as Airtable cannot process them.
fix_steps: Use Luxon's DateTime to convert the date to the required format.
Implement a check to ensure that if the date is empty or invalid, it is not sent to Airtable.
agent_instruction: Convert the date using Luxon's DateTime and ensure empty dates are not sent.
